title: 安田記念の後に・燃える戦場へ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon wins first place in the Yasuda
Kinen, and things are looking bright. Everyone is
looking forward to her future races and her
showdown with Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she wants to try taking on another big race
before the Arima Kinen, and sets her sights on the
Japan Cup.
